# GR8 GAMZ

GR8 GAMZ is a mobile-first browser game hub for original HTML5 games and curated partner-powered games.

Primary site: https://www.gr8gamz.com

## Active original-game routes

- / - homepage and featured games
- /games - canonical catalogue of 26 original games
- /top-games - featured and high-replay original games
- /arcade/{game-slug} - indexable original-game profile and play page

Canonical original-game slugs:

- neon-snake-rush
- stack-tower-rush
- turbo-drift-grid
- pixel-goal-hero
- space-tap-survival
- neon-breakout-rush
- cyber-basketball-shots
- zombie-lane-runner
- bubble-pop-blitz
- neon-air-hockey
- alien-invader-swarm
- crystal-match-quest
- dungeon-door-dash
- traffic-tap-chaos
- rocket-fuel-frenzy
- neon-pinball-rush
- cyber-bowling-blitz
- lava-tile-escape
- galaxy-golf-putt
- monster-truck-tap
- fruit-slice-fever
- shadow-ninja-leap
- cannon-coin-blast
- ice-slide-puzzle
- astro-memory-grid
- slope

## Active partner-game routes

- /more-free-games - curated GR8 Game Network catalogue
- /more-free-games/{game-slug} - indexable partner-game profile
- /more-free-games/{game-slug}/play - noindex live partner play route
- /more-free-games/categories/action-games
- /more-free-games/categories/puzzle-games
- /more-free-games/categories/racing-games
- /more-free-games/categories/sports-games
- /more-free-games/categories/arcade-games
- /more-free-games/categories/strategy-games
- /gamepix-games - GamePix partner overview
- /gamemonetize-games - GameMonetize CMS catalogue
- /gamemonetize-games/{game-slug} - indexable GameMonetize profile
- /gamemonetize-games/{game-slug}/play - noindex GameMonetize play route

Partner profile and category slugs are finite catalogue values. Unknown slugs return a real 404 response.

## Community and player routes

- /community
- /community/game-requests
- /community/high-scores
- /community/bug-reports
- /community/favourite-games
- /community/deal-ideas
- /auth
- /passport
- /my-arcade
- /daily-challenge
- /live
- /profile

## Trust and support routes

- /privacy
- /terms
- /community-guidelines
- /support
- /report

## Machine-readable and feed routes

- /sitemap.xml
- /robots.txt
- /ads.txt
- /manifest.webmanifest
- /api/gamepix/feed
- /api/gamemonetize/feed
- /api/partner-games/{game-slug}

Original-game metadata comes from the canonical src/data/games.json catalogue. Partner profile metadata comes from src/data/partnerGameProfiles.js.
